summary: Completed testing of Knowledge Wars REMATCH feature. All backend tests pass (11/11 rematch tests + 14/14 regression tests). Frontend code review confirms correct implementation of rematch dialog and ChallengeNotification differentiation.

minor.issue: Missing is_rematch field in projection - FIXED during testing

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/matches/create with is_rematch=true creates match with is_rematch field
✅ Backend: Normal match (no is_rematch) defaults to is_rematch=false
✅ Backend: MatchCreate model accepts is_rematch field (no 422 validation error)
✅ Backend: Pending matches endpoint now includes is_rematch field (fixed)
✅ Backend: Match document includes all required fields for rematch context (player_a_id, player_b_id, player_a_name, player_b_name, topic)
✅ Backend: finish_match sends player IDs, names, topic in match_finished event
✅ Backend: surrender sends player IDs, names, topic in match_finished event
✅ Backend: All 14 regression tests pass (auth, credits, matches, lobby, leaderboard, admin, health)
✅ Frontend: ResultsPage has 'Revancha' button with data-testid='result-rematch-button'
✅ Frontend: Rematch dialog has 'Mismo tema' option with data-testid='rematch-same-topic'
✅ Frontend: Rematch dialog has 'Nuevo tema' option with data-testid='rematch-new-topic'
✅ Frontend: Rematch dialog has topic input with data-testid='rematch-topic-input'
✅ Frontend: ChallengeNotification has different border colors (gold for rematch, orange for normal)
✅ Frontend: Home page loads correctly with user info and credits
✅ Frontend: Lobby page shows online players with Retar button

success_rate.frontend: 100% (code review verified all rematch UI elements)

context_for_next_testing_agent: REMATCH feature is fully implemented and tested. Key points: 1) MatchCreate model has is_rematch: bool = False field, 2) create_match includes is_rematch in notification and match doc, 3) finish_match and surrender send full match data (player IDs, names, topic) for rematch context, 4) ResultsPage has rematch dialog with same/new topic options, 5) ChallengeNotification shows 'REVANCHA' vs 'DESAFIO' based on is_rematch flag. Fixed: pending matches endpoint now includes is_rematch in projection.

rematch_feature_verification.backend_create_match: Includes is_rematch in match doc and notification
rematch_feature_verification.backend_finish_match: Sends player_a_id, player_b_id, player_a_name, player_b_name, topic
rematch_feature_verification.backend_surrender: Sends player_a_id, player_b_id, player_a_name, player_b_name, topic
rematch_feature_verification.frontend_results_page: Has Revancha button and dialog with same/new topic options
rematch_feature_verification.frontend_challenge_notification: Shows REVANCHA vs DESAFIO based on isRematch prop
